[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010000 1
1 0001101111 6
2 1000010110 4
3 1100100000 3
4 1011001111 7
5 1011000101 5
6 0000010000 1
7 0001101111 6
